description: Wait. Two mutually exclusive modes: (1) task_id mode: polls that task every 1s until done/error or timeout. (2) duration mode: simple sleep for N seconds (returns 'waited Ns'). If both task_id and duration are passed: task_id takes priority, duration is silently ignored. If only timeout is passed with no task_id: timeout has no effect (sleep mode ignores timeout). Returns (duration mode): 'waited 5.0s'. Returns (task_id mode): final task status with result details.
name: process_wait

duration.description: Sleep duration in seconds (sleep mode). Only used when task_id is NOT provided.

task_id.description: Task ID to wait for (polling mode). Polls every 1s until done/error or timeout. Mutually exclusive with duration.

timeout.description: Max wait time in seconds for polling mode only (default: 30). Ignored in duration/sleep mode.
